skills.name: CRM Schema Audit
skills.description: Builds a complete picture of the HubSpot CRM: audits all 30+ native object types plus custom objects, checks which are in use via record sampling, collects properties (with unique-identifier and fieldType metadata), fetches pipelines for all pipeline-enabled objects, pulls CRM limits (records, properties, pipelines, custom objects, association labels), and fetches property validation rules. Generates an HTML report with ERD diagrams, object usage status, pipeline breakdown, limits dashboard, and a filterable findings table.

skills.name: Property Dependency Mapper
skills.description: Maps every custom CRM property to the assets that reference it: Forms, Lists (segments), and Workflows (enrollment triggers and set-property actions). Identifies which properties are safe to archive (0 usages) vs. blocked by active assets. Also surfaces properties with field-level access restrictions (Enterprise).
triggers: which properties are safe to delete
why can't I delete this property
